name: writing-style-library-marketplace
description: Composable writing instructions for AI agents, organized on four orthogonal axes (Voice, Tone, Style, Format).

plugins.name: writing-style-library
plugins.description: Composable writing instructions on four orthogonal axes: Voice, Tone, Style, and Format. Select one entry per axis and the compose-instruction skill assembles a ready-to-paste prompt prefix that steers any LLM toward a precise register, reasoning pattern, and layout. v0.1.0 ships 60 curated entries (15 per axis), 195 worked examples across three anchor topics, 12 diff-pairs, and 5 horizontal-slice recipes. Follows the agentskills.io specification.
